builtBy: Bleibtgleich (single-designer portfolio, Kyiv) — UX/UI Designer & Webflow Developer
captureMethod: end-user pasted snapshot HTML (webarchive serving 500/503 to the crawler's IP during capture); capture_site.py had an origin-extraction bug that stripped the webarchive wrapper and hit the live parked domain, so the snapshot HTML was supplied directly. Stack + IA + motion reverse-engineered from that HTML.
stack: Webflow + GSAP 3.12 + ScrollTrigger + Three.js (r79) + Lenis 0.2.28 + Socket.io (cursor tracking + /msg edits). Approximated in-blank with framer-motion + CSS (see notes).

designTokens.font: Inter Tight (source: Webflow shared grotesk; site is fully lowercase)

motion: {%motion:hero-wrap%} — page-wrap scale .01→1, rotate -48→0, blur 32em→0 (3s power4.inOut, once/session)
{%motion:truth-reveal%} — word/letter split, per-unit random-stagger opacity (truth .18 / long .08 / symbol .1)
{%motion:grid-overlay%} — 12-col fixed overlay, per-col scaleX(0→1) on toggle (0.35s)
{%motion:project-storm%} — project-card hover spawns floating stills at random viewport positions (500ms cycle)
{%motion:webgl-distort%} — Three.js mouse-data-texture + chromatic aberration + 0.03 orange tint (DOCUMENTED; blank ships static plate)
{%motion:lenis%} — smooth scroll duration 1.2 exp easing (approximated in SmoothScroll.tsx)

imageStylePrompts.visionBg: wide desaturated warm-paper environment, faint grain, near-monochrome + single orange accent, chromatic-aberration energy
imageStylePrompts.projectStill: editorial design still, muted warm grade, tactile, 4:3
imageStylePrompts.encryptedMask: abstract negative-space mask on warm paper, unreadable
imageStylePrompts.aboutPortrait: centered portrait, warm seamless backdrop, soft directional light

notes: Honesty: framer-motion approximates the source's GSAP timelines — motion DNA (random-stagger truth reveals, rule grows, page-wrap blur-in, hover image-storm, shuffle) is faithful in intent, not pixel-identical timing. The Three.js WebGL mouse-distort plate is documented and shipped as a static PartImage placeholder; brand pass re-introduces the shader (see AGENTS.md). The Socket.io remote-cursor + console '/msg' edit features are social gimmicks, intentionally omitted from the blank. Capture caveat: webarchive was in a broad outage during capture and the live domain is parked (GoDaddy Auctions); the snapshot HTML was supplied by the end user.
